vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn
vocab.example: Driven by an insatiable curiosity, I spent hours dismantling old electronics to see their inner workings.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực/hoạt động mang tính nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Sketching was my primary artistic endeavor, and my sketchbook was a constant companion throughout my primary years.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng phong phú/sống động
vocab.example: I had a vivid imagination as a child, which led me to create elaborate storylines for my action figures.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm thông qua xúc giác (chạm, cầm nắm)
vocab.example: Pottery offered a tactile experience that I found incredibly soothing and grounded during my childhood.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về trí tuệ
vocab.example: Chess provided the intellectual stimulation I craved, teaching me to think several steps ahead.

vocab.meaning: bản chất kỳ ảo, hay thay đổi hoặc lạ lùng
vocab.example: Many of my hobbies had a whimsical nature, like building fairy houses out of twigs and pebbles in the garden.

vocab.meaning: phát triển kỹ năng/năng khiếu thiên bẩm về cái gì
vocab.example: I quickly developed a knack for solving complex puzzles that even my parents struggled with.

vocab.meaning: trò tiêu khiển/sở thích đáng trân trọng
vocab.example: Collecting rare coins was a cherished pastime that I shared with my grandfather every weekend.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/thúc đẩy sự sáng tạo
vocab.example: My parents always encouraged hobbies that would foster creativity rather than just passive screen time.
Learning the violin at a young age had a profound impact on my self-discipline and patience.
